creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
Found some references to fonts and "themes" where the fonts did not
include FBSD locations. NOTE that with the changes between X11R6 and
xorg, you may want to change "/usr/local/lib/X11/lib/fonts" to something
substitutable by Mk scripts. Included FBSD location for dvd-slideshow
themes under /usr/local/share (which was installed manually). Also
corrected ffmpeg "-ab <rate>" to include "k", otherwise ffmpeg would
ignore simple integer for audio bit rate.

Dvd-slideshow-examples/complete now "compiles" and "executes" without
any errors:

[runtest.sh] Removing old files...
mkdir: my_pictures: File exists
[runtest.sh] Executing command:
[runtest.sh] dir2slideshow -n 'Complete example' -s filename -t 5 -c 1
